title: Senior ICT Engineer
description:
Mott MacDonald Singapore currently has a brilliant opportunity for a Senior ICT Engineer to join an international global, management and development engineering consultancy, with opportunities for excellence every day. ​

  • Part of an innovative, global community of practices, solving important challenges. ​
  • Contributing to advancing our economic, environmental and social sustainability goals. ​
  • Where achieving excellence is celebrated​

We currently have an exciting opportunity for a driven Senior ICT Engineer to join our Buildings market in Singapore. ​

As a Senior ICT Engineer, you will be experienced in integrated smart building systems and services. In this role you will find opportunities for strong career progression by contributing to boutique and large scale local and international projects.

As the member of our team, you will have experience in a similar role and will be given a degree of autonomy and responsibility that suits a self-starting and self-reliant person who can deliver ICT/ELV design and supporting multi-discipline development, such as commercial, residential, hospital, hotel, leisure, mixed-use, critical facilities, data centers, airports, etc. You also will have opportunity to be involved in advisory work, providing advice and high-level consultancy services to clients from various industry.

We work as a connected global team, delivering impactful work that is shaping the future across design and delivery, and it is our people who are powering this change. As a proudly employee-owned business, we’re here to benefit our clients, each other and our local and global communities. Our progress enables us to invest in creating the right space for everyone to feel empowered, supported and valued.

What you will typically do:

  • Client and stakeholders management and relationships. Communicating with clients, manage clients’ requirements and expectation in alignment with the project’s contractual scope.
  • High-level and conceptual architecting of “state-of-the-art” integrated smart building/precinct systems and infrastructure, incl. client consulting, requirement management, conduct studies, options, gap analysis and solutioning.
  • Design and development of ICT/ELV infrastructure and systems, including spaces and pathways, fiber and copper structured cabling system, communication networking systems, integrated BMS platform, integrated security systems, building systems and data integration.
  • Collaborate on the development of the design package for tendering, incl. functional and performance specification, schedules, drawings, integration and interface management plan, interface coordination, integration and testing plan, etc.
  • Support the tendering process and supervise the implementation on behalf of client.
  • Fluent use of MS Visio, PowerPoint, AutoCAD, Revit, Revu and other equivalent mark-up/engineering tools for drawing, report, and presentation production.

About You: 

You will be a qualified Electrical, Electronics or ICT/Telecommunications Engineer or equivalent who is experienced in the design and specification of ICT/ELV systems and services within buildings. This role ideally suits someone with 4+ years of relevant experience and looking to join a growing team that holds technical excellence to high regard and offer an excellent opportunity for career progression.

To be the right person for the role, you will have:

  • Degree in Engineering
  • Current and proven experience as ICT/ELV Engineer with design experience within Buildings, Data Centres, Mission Critical Facilities, Airports, Commercial, Transport sectors.
  • Knowledge and experience in:
  • Building ICT infrastructure (incl. customer-owned Outside Plant) – required
  • Network and communication systems – required
  • Integrated Building Management System – required
  • Building ELV Systems - required
  • ICT/ELV and Building Systems and Data Integration - required
  • Smart Building, IoT, Data Analytics – required
  • Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning – highly desirable
  • Cybersecurity – highly desirable
  • Sustainability - highly desirable
  • ICT/ELV industry certification (e.g. credential from BICSI, WiredScore/SmartScore, EPI, CNET, CompTIA, UTI, Cisco, etc.) – highly desirable
  • Knowledge of Building Industry Standard and regulations
  • Highly developed interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills are essential.
  • Enthusiastic, self-motivated, a team player and customer focused

postedCompany.description:
One of the largest employee-owned companies in the world, Mott MacDonald is a multisector consultancy providing engineering, management, and development services on projects in 150 countries. With over 16,000 of the best people working on a diverse range of challenges, we’re helping our clients deliver sustainable infrastructure and development solutions. We have a collegiate and collaborative culture which values equality and diversity, and we take proactive steps to create an inclusive workplace. Together, we are opening opportunities with connected thinking. If this sounds like somewhere you'd like to work, click apply to continue with your application.


Singapore's best employers 2021
We are proud to have been recognised in The Strait Times list of Singapore’s Best Employers in 2021 in recognition of our focus on work-life balance, development opportunities, culture and benefits.


Equality, diversity and inclusion
We put equality, diversity and inclusion at the heart of our business, seeking to promote fair employment procedures and practices to ensure equal opportunities for all. We encourage individual expression in our workplace and are committed to creating an inclusive environment where everyone feels they have the opportunity to contribute.


Agile working
At Mott MacDonald, we believe it makes business sense for you and your manager to choose how you can work most effectively to meet your client, team and personal commitments. We embrace agility, flexibility and trust.
postedCompany.name: MOTT MACDONALD SINGAPORE PTE LIMITED
